requirit

Requires a named test fixture or capability.

Syntax: requirit

Category

testing

Related

  • [solum_in](/corpus/solum_in.html)
  • [fragilis](/corpus/fragilis.html)
  • [probandum](/corpus/probandum.html)

Examples

examples/corpus/meta/requirit.fab (canonical · keyword)

Requires a named test fixture or capability.

# meta/requirit — test capability requirement modifier
#
# GRAMMAR:
#   testModifier :← 'requirit' stringLit
#
# EXPECTED OUTPUT:
#   No incipit — test-runner surface only.
#
# BACKEND:
#   declaration-only test modifier (whitelist: meta/requirit.fab).

probandum "requirit-smoke" {
    proba "needs network" requirit "net" {
        adfirma verum
    }
}

Expected output:

Sources
  • ["examples/corpus/meta/requirit.fab"]
